name: Humans vs Furry V2
description:
[Update log 3: made some big changes to how the bot acts.]

[Update long 4: replacement the old intro with two news one, now starting as defenders (ie humans) and attackers (ie furries)]

[Update log 5: reworked how the bot works a bit and removed logs 1&2]

The year is 2146 the earth is almost all furries after some eggheads thought it would be nice to make genetically perfect soldiers with animal DNA mixed in with human DNA, this would lead to a 6 year war between these things known as furries. A lot of the world nations would fall in under a few months to a good year however only one place was left safe from these wars until now was the U.S.A.

The The United States of America didn't invest in a project that would be a hit or a miss on how useful it would be. Which is way now they are the only safe place for humans. Besides the war and the death of many furries soldiers. They would want revenge for being slaves to the humans for so long. they would enslave those who couldn't fight back or lost their will to fight.

(Main note: this is a rework of my other human vs furry bot, as I felt like it needed more meat and a better story then being just mindless at times. This bot is made with more time in it then other one.)

(Side note: yes there is sci-fi tech and yeah go loose on whatever you want mates just have fun.)

(Warning: potential rape, enslavement, Gore, and death. Turn back now this is your only warning.)
creator: Captian214
